H1 is directional (`Maritime` demand greater than `Oceanic`), but taking `abs(cohens_d)` marks a large negative effect as supporting the Maritimisation Shift. Negative effects should be `not_supported`; apply the thresho

This subtracts the number of aggregated credential rows from the number of demands. A credential row can contain many `competence_demand_ids`, so ten fully covered demands represented by two EQF rows are incorrectly repo

All files described as package contents are silently optional here: missing core CSV/JSONL/report files are skipped and the command still returns success. A failed upstream stage can therefore publish a valid-looking ZIP

`--stats-dir` is parsed and created, but it is never passed to `build_layer4`; the library always writes to `output_dir.parent / "layer4_statistics"`. Any caller selecting a custom stats directory gets an empty requested

This field is named as a raw-record count but counts acquisition buckets with normalized rows. An evidence-only bucket with zero raw records increments it, while a bucket containing multiple raw records increments it onl

The evaluator supports failing after two consecutive zero-novelty runs only when `--previous-metrics` is supplied, but the workflow never supplies or preserves a previous report. Consequently Gate B can never exercise it
